DISEASE 205
aspected by Rahu. (vii) The 8th house being occupied by three
or four malefics without any benefic association, (viii) Mars,
or the Sun and Saturn being in the 8th house and receiving the
aspect of debilitated, inimical or malefic planets.
Stomach-diseases : — (i) Mars be in the ascendant when the
lord of the 6th is weak, (ii) Saturn be in the 8th, and Rahu
or a malefic in the Lagna. (iii) The lord of Lagna be in an
inimical house or debilitated, and Mars and Saturn occupying
the 4th house are aspected by a malefic, (iv) The lord of the
8th house being weak, the ascendant is aspected by malefics,
and the 8th house itself is occupied or aspected by Saturn, (v)
The Sun, Moon and Mars together occupying the sixth bouse,
(vi) The 8th house be Makara, or the Navamsa of the lord of
the 8th be the same, (vii) Ketu tenanting the 5th house, and
lord of the 5th be weak. We have also seen before that the
Moon in Leo tends to upset the stomach. According to one
